name: Love Island All Stars: The Morning After
original_name: Love Island All Stars: The Morning After
overview: All the goss from the night before - who likes who and what did they do?! Join hosts Indiyah Polack and Amy Hart for all the need-to-know chat from the villa.

trailers.title: If you don’t immediately search their star sign after a date, you’re doing it wrong 🤪 #LoveIsland
